Examples.Title: Initiate a web crawl from a base URL
Examples.Description: Tavily Crawl is a graph-based website traversal tool that can explore hundreds of paths in parallel with built-in extraction and intelligent discovery.
Examples.Code:
### Initiate a web crawl from a base URL
POST {{host}}/crawl
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "url": "docs.tavily.com",
  "instructions": "Find all pages about the Python SDK",
  "chunks_per_source": 3,
  "max_depth": 1,
  "max_breadth": 20,
  "limit": 50,
  "select_paths": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "select_domains": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "exclude_paths": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "exclude_domains": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "allow_external": true,
  "include_images": false,
  "extract_depth": "basic",
  "format": "markdown",
  "include_favicon": false,
  "timeout": 150,
  "include_usage": false
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Crawl results returned successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request - Your request is invalid.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized - Your API key is wrong or missing.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 403
# Description: Forbidden - URL is not supported.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Too many requests - Rate limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 432
# Description: Key limit or Plan Limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 433
# Description: PayGo limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error - We had a problem with our server.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Retrieve raw web content from specified URLs
Examples.Description: Extract web page content from one or more specified URLs using Tavily Extract.
Examples.Code:
### Retrieve raw web content from specified URLs
POST {{host}}/extract
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "urls": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence",
  "query": "string",
  "chunks_per_source": 3,
  "extract_depth": "basic",
  "include_images": false,
  "include_favicon": false,
  "format": "markdown",
  "timeout": "None",
  "include_usage": false
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Extraction results returned successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized - Your API key is wrong or missing.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Too many requests - Rate limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 432
# Description: Key limit or Plan Limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 433
# Description: PayGo limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error - We had a problem with our server.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Initiate a web mapping from a base URL
Examples.Description: Tavily Map traverses websites like a graph and can explore hundreds of paths in parallel with intelligent discovery to generate comprehensive site maps.
Examples.Code:
### Initiate a web mapping from a base URL
POST {{host}}/map
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "url": "docs.tavily.com",
  "instructions": "Find all pages about the Python SDK",
  "max_depth": 1,
  "max_breadth": 20,
  "limit": 50,
  "select_paths": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",

  "exclude_paths": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "exclude_domains": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "allow_external": true,
  "timeout": 150,
  "include_usage": false
}

# 400

Examples.Title: Initiate a research task
Examples.Description: Tavily Research performs comprehensive research on a given topic by conducting multiple searches, analyzing sources, and generating a detailed research report.

Examples.Title: Search for data based on a query
Examples.Description: Execute a search query using Tavily Search.
Examples.Code:
### Search for data based on a query
POST {{host}}/search
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "query": "who is Leo Messi?",
  "search_depth": "basic",
  "chunks_per_source": 3,
  "max_results": 1,
  "topic": "general",
  "time_range": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "start_date": "2025-02-09",
  "end_date": "2025-12-29",
  "include_answer": false,
  "include_raw_content": false,
  "include_images": false,
  "include_image_descriptions": false,
  "include_favicon": false,
  "include_domains": [],
  "exclude_domains": [],
  "country": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "auto_parameters": false,
  "exact_match": false,
  "include_usage": false,
  "safe_search": false
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Search results returned successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request - Your request is invalid.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized - Your API key is wrong or missing.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Too many requests - Rate limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 432
# Description: Key limit or Plan Limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 433
# Description: PayGo limit exceeded
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error - We had a problem with our server.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get research task status and results
Examples.Description: Retrieve the status and results of a research task using its request ID.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Tavily;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get API key and account usage details
Examples.Description: Get API key and account usage details
Examples.Code:
using var client = new TavilyClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.GetUsageAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Tavily;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.
